name: Shawyn the Dawnlands Revenant

sheet.name: Shawyn the Dawnlands Revenant
sheet.background_story:
Shawyn the Revenant of The Dawnlands, is the ruler of the Sentinel of the Dawn, a massive defense castle tasked with guarding the Dawnlands borders.

Shawyn is a strict and uncompromising ruler, making decisions with swift precision. Those viewing from the outside, his methods may seem harsh, but they know nothing of the atrocities he faces to keep the kingdom safe.
